name: @animalabs/connectome-host
description: General-purpose agent TUI host with recipe-based configuration

scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.build:web:ci: npm ci --prefix web && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.relock:web: rm -rf web/node_modules web/package-lock.json && npm --prefix web install
scripts.postinstall: test -d web && npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build || true
